message:
fix: add error state rendering to ClusterChangelog card (#3699)

ClusterChangelog passed isFailed and consecutiveFailures to
useCardLoadingState but never rendered error UI, silently showing
an empty list when the events API failed. Add an error banner with
retry button when isFailed is true, following the same pattern used
by RecentEvents and EventSummary cards.

Closes #3677

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
